vo/compmode/cm_demo_gamewon_01.mp3.transcript: Oh, we won? Heh heh, I dinnae know we were playing anybody!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_gamewon_rare_01.mp3.transcript: Ah hah! They came to a sticky end, dinnae they? That's a bomb joke.

vo/compmode/cm_demo_gamewon_rare_02.mp3.transcript: Where was the other team during that last round? Oh, that's right, they were in bits all over the point!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_gamewon_rare_03.mp3.transcript: I dinnae even know we were fightin' another team! I just thought we were just testing our weapons!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_gamewon_rare_04.mp3.transcript: Ha ha ha! I'm a drunk and glorious man!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_matchwon_01.mp3.transcript: 'Course we won! You got a bloody Demo, don't ya?

vo/compmode/cm_demo_matchwon_03.mp3.transcript: Hoh hor! Was that it, then?

vo/compmode/cm_demo_matchwon_04.mp3.transcript: Are we done? I was just gettin' warmed up!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamefirst_02.mp3.transcript: Stand back and watch how it's done, lads!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamefirst_6s_01.m.transcript: I killed the bloody Loch Ness Monster! I ain't afraid of six wee men!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamefirst_6s_02.m.transcript: Who's ready for a wee game of 6s?

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamefirst_6s_03.m.transcript: Aww, six wee baby lambs come to slaughter!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamefirst_comp_01.transcript: Let's push 'em back to spawn, lads!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamefirst_comp_02.transcript: Not a single one of 'em can lay a proper sticky!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamefirst_comp_03.transcript: Lads, I watched their scrim! I think this might be a mercy killing!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamefirst_comp_04.transcript: I've been saving the good scrumpy for Competitive Mode!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamefirst_rare_01.transcript: Lads, I don't mean to worry you, but I saw their scrim earlier and they're real bloody good! Hah hah ha! Nah, they're terrible!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamefirst_rare_02.transcript: I got a good feeling about this match, lads! Dinnae tell anyone... [sotto voce] I brought a lot of bloody bombs!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamefirst_rare_03.transcript: I came here to kick arse and have two eyes! And I'm all out of eyes! Well, half out.

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamelostlast_02.m.transcript: Dinnae worry, lads, we're turning this tide now!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamelostlast_03.m.transcript: Alright, no more foolin' around! Let's win this one!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamelostlast_04.m.transcript: I've a bomb with each and every one of their names on it!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamelostlast_rare.transcript: Did we win or lose that last one? Eh, either way, it deserves a drink!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregametie_03.mp3.transcript: Oh, it's a tie, is it? We'll see about that!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregametie_04.mp3.transcript: Time to break the tie, lads!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamewonlast_02.mp.transcript: Ha ha ha! We've got 'em on the run!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamewonlast_03.mp.transcript: Bear down, lads! Let's finish it!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamewonlast_04.mp.transcript: Oh, I'm ready, lad! Let's go cause some more trouble!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_pregamewonlast_rare_.transcript: Let's give 'em a sportin' chance! Someone, take out me other eye!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_rankup_04.mp3.transcript: Oh, a wee promotion? Don't mind if I do!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_rankup_06.mp3.transcript: Ha ha! I love ranking up!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_rankup_07.mp3.transcript: Ho hah! Oh, I could rank up all day!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_rankup_10.mp3.transcript: What rank up gets me eye back, do you think?

vo/compmode/cm_demo_rankup_highest_01.mp.transcript: Remember, lad, it wasn't the easy matches that got you here, it was the bloody impossible ones!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_summary_callout_05.m.transcript: Ack, I knew you could do it!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_summary_callout_06.m.transcript: Ha ha ha! We did it, lads!

vo/compmode/cm_demo_summary_callout_07.m.transcript: We did it, lad! Ha ha ha ha ha!

vo/demoman_autocappedcontrolpoint03.mp3.transcript: Now it's our flippin' point, hehah!

vo/demoman_autocappedintelligence01.mp3.transcript: Aye, that's the way ye do it! Hehah!

vo/demoman_battlecry06.mp3.transcript: Aigheaght's the way to do it!

vo/demoman_cartgoingbackdefense01.mp3.transcript: Roll back to Hell, ya bloody cart!

vo/demoman_cartgoingforwardoffense02.mp3.transcript: Put yer backs into it, lads!

vo/demoman_cartstaycloseoffense02.mp3.transcript: Stay close to that bloody cart!

vo/demoman_cheers02.mp3.transcript: I love... every... single... one of ye... not you.

vo/demoman_cheers03.mp3.transcript: Imagine if I hadn't been drunk!

vo/demoman_cheers05.mp3.transcript: See? I told ye they were a buncha' wee lasses!

vo/demoman_cheers06.mp3.transcript: I don't think they saw that one comin'!

vo/demoman_cheers07.mp3.transcript: If I wasn' the man I was I'd kiss ye!

vo/demoman_cheers08.mp3.transcript: It's a fine thing, lads, heheh.

vo/demoman_dominationdemoman01.mp3.transcript: Thus begins my thousand year reign of blood!

vo/demoman_dominationdemoman02.mp3.transcript: DOMINATED! I feel everything! I know everything!

vo/demoman_dominationengineer01.mp3.transcript: Don't hide behind yer toys, lad!

vo/demoman_dominationengineer02.mp3.transcript: You're weak. I'm strong. And I win, toymaker!

vo/demoman_dominationengineer03.mp3.transcript: That's a right pretty bra-washer ya built, ya big ugly girl!

vo/demoman_dominationengineer04.mp3.transcript: You come wide at me again, boy, I'll stick that wrench right up yer arse!

vo/demoman_dominationengineer05.mp3.transcript: Go on and build more o' yer little guns. I'll shove every one of them up yer arse!

vo/demoman_dominationengineer06.mp3.transcript: If you were huntin' trouble, lad, ya found it.

vo/demoman_dominationheavy02.mp3.transcript: Ohhh... There's a new gravy-filled angel in heaven.

vo/demoman_dominationheavy04.mp3.transcript: Awww.... There's a new angel in heaven... IN HELL!

vo/demoman_dominationheavy05.mp3.transcript: Little too much caber-tossin' pie down yer own throat, eh, chubby?

vo/demoman_dominationmedic02.mp3.transcript: How's that doin' no harm workin' out for ya, then?

vo/demoman_dominationmedic03.mp3.transcript: Dominated! ...And I've been shaggin' yer wife! Hahah!

vo/demoman_dominationpyro01.mp3.transcript: You've brought shame on yer people, ya mumblin' devil.

vo/demoman_dominationpyro02.mp3.transcript: Go home, lassie; men are fightin' here!

vo/demoman_dominationpyro03.mp3.transcript: Go to hell, and tell the devil I'm comin' for him next!

vo/demoman_dominationscout04.mp3.transcript: Don't come wide with me, ye pint-sized mutt!

vo/demoman_dominationscout05.mp3.transcript: Yer like a little bunny... Scurryin' around, eatin' up yer lettuce and berries!

vo/demoman_dominationscout06.mp3.transcript: Yer so bloody TINY! Yer like a toy-sized version of a man!

vo/demoman_dominationscout07.mp3.transcript: Grow some hair on yer face, and come and try me again, lad.

vo/demoman_dominationscout08.mp3.transcript: Oh, you're a wee little miss, you are!

vo/demoman_dominationsniper01.mp3.transcript: Perfect bloody domination, ya campy weasel!

vo/demoman_dominationsniper03.mp3.transcript: I hate you campers; everybody bloody hates you!

vo/demoman_dominationsniper04.mp3.transcript: It's lads like you that give war a bad name!

vo/demoman_dominationsoldier01.mp3.transcript: DOMINATED! Ha ha ha ha ha ha!

vo/demoman_dominationsoldier02.mp3.transcript: I'll notify yer next o' kin... That ya sucked!

vo/demoman_dominationsoldier03.mp3.transcript: Hey, Private Haircut, I might've taken a bit too much off... Yer head!

vo/demoman_dominationsoldier04.mp3.transcript: Mother o' mercy! Now that is a bloody domination!

vo/demoman_dominationsoldier05.mp3.transcript: Lot o' good that Soldier trainin' did ya! I'm drunk!

vo/demoman_dominationsoldierupdate01.mp3.transcript: Dominated!" [sotto voce] "But you're a good man, and I love you.

vo/demoman_dominationsoldierupdate02.mp3.transcript: Everybody, I don't like this man. He is a soulless monster!" [sotto voce] "I do like you, it's just for show.

vo/demoman_dominationsoldierupdate03.mp3.transcript: Dominated!" [sotto voce] "But you're still me best mate. (chuckles)

vo/demoman_dominationsoldierupdate04.mp3.transcript: Dominated!" [sotto voce] "But I treasure your friendship.

vo/demoman_dominationsoldierupdate05.mp3.transcript: Dominated!" [sotto voce] "You are okay, though. Right, lad?

vo/demoman_dominationsoldierupdate06.mp3.transcript: My greatest enemy is dead!" [sotto voce] "We should be friends forever, eh?

vo/demoman_dominationspy02.mp3.transcript: Yer a back-pokin' snake, and by God you'll die like one!

vo/demoman_dominationspy03.mp3.transcript: I hope I didn't scare you with my face-to-face man fightin'!

vo/demoman_eyelandertaunt01.mp3.transcript: There can be only one... eye!

vo/demoman_gibberish01.mp3.transcript: And then I'll grow yer arse's arse and I'm the grass man, punk yeah heaven's heathen...

vo/demoman_gibberish04.mp3.transcript: Any of you that think ye're better 'n me, you're gon' have another thing c-...

vo/demoman_gibberish06.mp3.transcript: Everyone thinks I'm just a one-eyed bloody monster! God damn it, Finnegan...

vo/demoman_gibberish07.mp3.transcript: Everyone thinks I'm-- God damn it, Finnegan...

vo/demoman_gibberish09.mp3.transcript: Gonna kill you and I'll keep killin' you and I'll never, cause you're 'onna be dead and I don't gotta kill you.

vo/demoman_gibberish10.mp3.transcript: Any one of you (belches) Everyone-- damn it, Finnegan...

vo/demoman_gibberish11.mp3.transcript: It's on! It's on like (falls asleep, then wakes up) Wha--?

vo/demoman_gibberish12.mp3.transcript: Just bought two tickets to the gun show, and I'm not givin' 'em to ya; I'm goin' with your tickets!" (laughs, falls asleep) "Wha--?

vo/demoman_gibberish13.mp3.transcript: ...Gonna take down to the pain train station in train town...

vo/demoman_helpmecapture01.mp3.transcript: Give us a hand here with this point!

vo/demoman_helpmecapture02.mp3.transcript: Help me capture this bloody thing!

vo/demoman_helpmecapture03.mp3.transcript: Come here lad help me capture this!

vo/demoman_helpmedefend01.mp3.transcript: I can't hold them off alone heeere!

vo/demoman_helpmedefend02.mp3.transcript: I need some help holding them off!

vo/demoman_helpmedefend03.mp3.transcript: Get over here and help me defend, ya idiot!

vo/demoman_item_unicorn_domination01.mp3.transcript: Who's laughin' at me pink wig now?!

vo/demoman_item_unicorn_domination04.mp3.transcript: Dominated! Ya wee unicorn-hatin' piece o' crap!

vo/demoman_item_unicorn_domination05.mp3.transcript: Dominated! Accordin' to unicorn law, yer me bloody wife now.

vo/demoman_item_unicorn_round_start03.mp.transcript: Unicorn brothers! Tonight, we pony prance in HELL!

vo/demoman_item_unicorn_uber01.mp3.transcript: I'm a unicorn from Hell, and I'm comin' for ya!

vo/demoman_item_unicorn_uber03.mp3.transcript: I'm bearin' a message of peace!

vo/demoman_jeers03.mp3.transcript: [Slurred] "I'm drunk - you don't have an excuse!"

vo/demoman_jeers04.mp3.transcript: I feel like every bone in me body's broke!

vo/demoman_jeers09.mp3.transcript: Buck up, lads! We'll get 'em next time.

vo/demoman_jeers10.mp3.transcript: I almost joined their bloody team!

vo/demoman_mvm_loot_common02.mp3.transcript: Oh, now would ya look at that!

vo/demoman_mvm_loot_rare02.mp3.transcript: Oh, what's your name, ya pretty lit'le thing?

vo/demoman_mvm_mannhattan_gate_atk03.mp3.transcript: Robots are taking the gate, lads!

vo/demoman_mvm_mannhattan_gate_take01.mp.transcript: Argh! The robots took the gate!

vo/demoman_mvm_mannhattan_gate_take02.mp.transcript: The tin cans have the gate, lads!

vo/demoman_positivevocalization05.mp3.transcript: THAT'S THE WAY YA DO IT!

vo/demoman_sf12_badmagic03.mp3.transcript: "Ahhh! Me head! It's wee. It's a wee head..." [fades

vo/demoman_sf12_badmagic06.mp3.transcript: Yer wicked! And you'll burn fer it, Merasmus!

vo/demoman_sf12_bombinomicon01.mp3.transcript: He's got that book that stole me eye!

vo/demoman_sf12_bombinomicon02.mp3.transcript: That dark book is full of magic bombs!

vo/demoman_sf12_bombinomicon03.mp3.transcript: That Bombinomicon is about to blow!

vo/demoman_sf12_bombinomicon04.mp3.transcript: Ya call those bombs, ya wee little romance novel? I'll show you bombs!

vo/demoman_sf12_bombinomicon05.mp3.transcript: Watch out, lads! That book's the Bombinomicon!

vo/demoman_sf12_bombinomicon06.mp3.transcript: The student has become the one-eyed master, ya fancy perfume catalog!

vo/demoman_sf12_goodmagic01.mp3.transcript: Wuh huh ho! Who's laughing now, wizard?

vo/demoman_sf12_goodmagic02.mp3.transcript: Yah should not have done that, wizard!

vo/demoman_sf12_goodmagic03.mp3.transcript: Yer magic is weak, old man!

vo/demoman_sf12_goodmagic04.mp3.transcript: What manner of witchcraft is this?

vo/demoman_sf12_healing02.mp3.transcript: Kill him. Kill him, he's healin' himself!

vo/demoman_sf12_seeking01.mp3.transcript: You better hide, wizard! I'll kick you back to whatever hell you crawled out of!

vo/demoman_sf12_seeking03.mp3.transcript: Merasmus! We've got unfinished business, you and I! And by God, I'll see it settled!

vo/demoman_sf12_seeking04.mp3.transcript: Merasmus! I'll have me eye back, you shifty dog!

vo/demoman_sf12_seeking05.mp3.transcript: Merasmus! Give me my eye back, you wizard!

vo/demoman_sf12_seeking06.mp3.transcript: Merasmus! I've got yer nickel! Give me back me eye!

vo/demoman_sf12_seeking07.mp3.transcript: Wizard! You turned me own eye against me! And by God, I'll kill you for it!

vo/demoman_sf12_seeking08.mp3.transcript: Eye for an eye, wizard-man! I'll chew the eyeballs right out of your skull!

vo/demoman_sf12_seeking09.mp3.transcript: This Demoman needs an eye, wizard! Hah! Yours will do just fine.

vo/demoman_sf13_influx_big04.mp3.transcript: Oh, I'm full of bombs and magic!

vo/demoman_sf13_midnight04.mp3.transcript: We can get to the island! Go, go!

vo/demoman_sf13_round_start01.mp3.transcript: Freedom! To roll a wheelchair to Hell!

vo/demoman_sf13_round_start02.mp3.transcript: Let's send that old man to Hell!!

vo/demoman_specialcompleted-assistedkill.transcript: I didn't need yer help, ya know.

vo/demoman_specialcompleted01.mp3.transcript: And that's what yeh get for touching that!

vo/demoman_specialcompleted03.mp3.transcript: You appear to have trodden on a mine!

vo/demoman_specialcompleted05.mp3.transcript: That was my point you were standin' on!

vo/demoman_specialcompleted06.mp3.transcript: Next time you'll bloody ask before you stand on my point.

vo/demoman_specialcompleted07.mp3.transcript: Bloody hell, those ones were me favorites!

vo/demoman_specialcompleted08.mp3.transcript: Let that be a bloody lesson to yeh!

vo/demoman_specialcompleted09.mp3.transcript: I had me good eye on you the whole time!

vo/demoman_specialcompleted10.mp3.transcript: Couldn't ya see the bloody bombs?

vo/demoman_standonthepoint01.mp3.transcript: Stand on the bloody point, ya half-wit!

vo/demoman_standonthepoint02.mp3.transcript: Stand on the point, ya git!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_01.mp3.transcript: Whoo, whoo, yah sure! Woh, hup sti'that! Hup, hup, hup yap!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_03.mp3.transcript: Hup, all right, here we go! Whoo! Whoo! That's right, whoo! Whoo!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_05.mp3.transcript: Hup hup hup, everybody! Feet up, feet up, feet up! That's it, there's go, ho ho! Oh yeah!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_11.mp3.transcript: Oh, d'ye like that, yeah? Oh you like that, oh!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_13.mp3.transcript: I'm a Scottish dancin' machine! Ha!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_15.mp3.transcript: I'm a bloody, I'm bloody on fire!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_17.mp3.transcript: Ah, who needs this depth perception when you can bloody move like this!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_24.mp3.transcript: Oh, I'm not going anywhere! I'm not going anywhere! I'm not going anywhere! Oh!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_31.mp3.transcript: Aye, a bit of this! And a wee bit of that! A wee bit of this!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_33.mp3.transcript: Aye, a bit of this! And a bit of this! A wee bit of this!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_40.mp3.transcript: Feet up! That's it! Let's go! Ho, ho! Oh yeah!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_aerobic_boom_03.mp3.transcript: And...boom goes the bomb! Ha ha!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_badpipes_05.mp3.transcript: Oh it brings tears to the eye, it does!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_badpipes_08.mp3.transcript: Like a chorus of wee bagpipe-playing angels!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_badpipes_09.mp3.transcript: Never played before in me life!

vo/taunts/demo/demo_trade_20.mp3.transcript: [questioning, hopeful and pleased grunts with a laugh

vo/taunts/demo/taunt_demo_conga_int_02.m.transcript: CONGA! Conga, Conga! Ha ha ha!

vo/taunts/demo/taunt_demo_flip_post_fun_.transcript: Oh ho ah ho, I'm dizzy!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts01.mp3.transcript: All yah dandies prancin' aboot with ya heads full of eyeballs!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts03.mp3.transcript: I'm gonna stick me thumbs in yer eyes and hang on 'till yer deid!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts04.mp3.transcript: Don't fret, boyo. I'll be gentle!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts05.mp3.transcript: Ohh, I'm gonna beat ya so hard, you'll have a twitch!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts06.mp3.transcript: I'm gonna be all over ya like shingles!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts08.mp3.transcript: Oh, they're goin' ta have to glue you back together... IN HELL!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts09.mp3.transcript: I'm goin' ta blast ya into thin gruel!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts10.mp3.transcript: Oh, they're gonna find ya all dead in the alley, with cats lickin' at ya!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts11.mp3.transcript: Not one of ya's going to survive this!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts13.mp3.transcript: Oooohhh, I'm goin' ta liquefy ya!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts14.mp3.transcript: I'm going to strangle you with me bare hands!

vo/taunts/demoman_taunts16.mp3.transcript: They're goin' ta bury what's left of ye in a soup can!

vo/toughbreak/demo_quest_complete_easy_0.transcript: Ho, hoh! Was that it, then?
Are we done? I was just getting warmed up!

vo/toughbreak/demo_quest_complete_hard_0.transcript: I won't lie, lad, that was a tough one!
We only went an' bloody did it, didn't we? Ah ha ha ha!
As long as I've got bombs and there's men need killing, I'm your man!
